# Security Policy

## Supported versions
Only the latest released version receives security fixes.

## Reporting a vulnerability
Please **do not** open a public issue for security problems.

Report vulnerabilities privately to **dev@taranovegor.com**, or via GitHub's
[private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/taranovegor/tomsg_bot/security/advisories/new).

Include what is needed to reproduce the issue (affected version, steps, impact). We aim to
acknowledge reports within a few days and will keep you updated on the fix.
